calibration_notes: My recent BEARISH calls performed perfectly on next-day (4/4 correct) but struggled intraday (2/5 correct), particularly on IWM and NVDA where I missed bullish reversals. I was overweighting options flow bearishness without accounting for oversold bounce potential. Adjusting: for intraday calls after sharp declines, I'll cap BEARISH confidence at 50% unless news catalysts are explicitly negative.

news_impact: Oil surge past $94 creating stagflation fears despite moderating core inflation. Oracle/Uber AI news providing pockets of strength but overwhelmed by macro concerns. DeepSeek AI disruption adding uncertainty to mega-cap tech valuations.
options_flow_impact: P/C ratio 1.285 with $479M in puts vs $372M calls confirms institutional hedging. The extreme ITM put strikes (75-85% below spot) on MSFT/AAPL/META suggest black swan hedging or major correction positioning beyond typical protection.
risks: Geopolitical de-escalation could reverse oil spike rapidly
Oversold bounce could extend beyond intraday into multi-day relief rally
Fed pivot expectations if inflation moderates further
